diagrams.title: CourseHub API Data Model
diagrams.description: Entity Relationship Diagram showing the core database schema for users, courses, modules, and enrollments.
diagrams.mermaid_code:
erDiagram
    DB-USER ||--o{ DB-COURSE : "instructs"
    DB-USER ||--o{ DB-ENROLL : "enrolls"
    DB-COURSE ||--o{ DB-ENROLL : "has"
    DB-COURSE ||--o{ MODULE : "contains"

    DB-USER {
        int id PK
        string email
        string hashed_password
        string role
        string display_name
    }
    DB-COURSE {
        int id PK
        int instructor_id FK
        string title
        int price_cents
        boolean published
    }
    DB-ENROLL {
        int id PK
        int student_id FK
        int course_id FK
        int progress
        datetime completed_at
    }
    MODULE {
        int id PK
        int course_id FK
        string title
        int order
    }

diagrams.title: Course Deletion Workflow
diagrams.description: Logic flow for the Course Deletion endpoint implementing the ActiveEnrollmentConstraint business rule.
diagrams.mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    START[Start: DELETE /api/v1/courses/id] --> AUTH_CHECK{"Is User Instructor?"}
    AUTH_CHECK -- "No" --> ERR_403["Return 403 Forbidden"]
    AUTH_CHECK -- "Yes" --> OWNERSHIP_CHECK{"Is Owner of Course?"}
    
    OWNERSHIP_CHECK -- "No" --> ERR_403
    OWNERSHIP_CHECK -- "Yes" --> RULE_CHECK{"ActiveEnrollmentConstraint: Any Enrollments?"}
    
    RULE_CHECK -- "Yes" --> ERR_409["Return 409 Conflict: Cannot delete course with active enrollments"]
    RULE_CHECK -- "No" --> DELETE_OP["Delete Course and Modules"]
    
    ERR_403 --> END[End]
    ERR_409 --> END
    DELETE_OP --> END

diagrams.title: User Registration & Email Sequence
diagrams.description: Sequence of interactions for user registration including the asynchronous background email task.
diagrams.mermaid_code:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    actor Student
    participant API as "EP-AUTH-REG: /auth/register"
    participant DB as "DB-USER"
    participant BG as "ARCH-BG-EMAIL: BackgroundTask"
    participant Resend as "Resend Email Service"

    Student ->> API: POST registration data
    API ->> DB: Create User (role=student)
    DB -->> API: User Created
    API ->> BG: Queue send_welcome_email_async
    API -->> Student: Return 201 Created + JWT Tokens
    
    Note over BG, Resend: Execution happens after response is sent
    BG ->> Resend: API Call with Welcome Template
    Resend -->> BG: Email Sent Confirmation

diagrams.title: Implementation Phase Traceability
diagrams.description: Traceability map of project phases and their dependencies.
diagrams.mermaid_code:
flowchart LR
    subgraph Foundation
        PHASE-01["PHASE-01: Project Foundation & DB Schema"]
    end

    subgraph Security
        PHASE-02["PHASE-02: Auth Router — JWT Flow"]
    end

    subgraph Domain
        PHASE-04["PHASE-04: Courses Router — CRUD"]
        PHASE-05["PHASE-05: Enrolments Router — Progress"]
    end

    PHASE-01 --> PHASE-02
    PHASE-02 --> PHASE-04
    PHASE-02 --> PHASE-05
    PHASE-04 --> PHASE-05
